# text / inline

The **text** type's `data-view.cell-editor` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.CellEditor({ match: "text", ... })` — a compact
`TextEditor` (an autofocused `Input` filling the cell) that commits the edited
string on Enter / blur (empty ⇒ `null`) and cancels on Esc. Derived text types
(e.g. `multiline-text`) reuse this editor via the `extends`-chain fallback.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Text field type: data-view inline cell editor (compact text input editor).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.CellEditor` "text" → `TextEditor`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/ui-kit.Input`
